title: Narrating while doing increase focus
html:
Not sure why, but I feel it. Here are some probable hypotheses:

  • Direct Attention, reducing mind-wandering.
  • Reduces Distractions: It's harder for irrelevant thoughts to intrude when your mind is occupied with narration.
  • Engages Multiple Modalities: Combining speech with action.

I should do this more.

from Imgflip Meme Generator
